title: rubus lineatus f. glabrior
intro: Rubus lineatus f. glabrior, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family, specifically a variant of the Rubus lineatus species. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Rubus lineatus f. glabrior include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Rubus lineatus f. glabrior can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
